message:
refactor: infrastructure cleanup and sandbox path traversal hardening

Seven files receive targeted code quality improvements:

discovery.rs: Use try_from() instead of as-cast for TTL seconds
  conversion, preventing silent truncation on overflow.

doctor.rs: Combine Ok|Unsupported match arms into single Info branch.
  Change check function signature to take SelfCheckStatus by value.

resilience.rs: Replace closure unwrap_or_else with explicit function
  path (PoisonError::into_inner). Remove unused ensure_connector()
  method.

gossip.rs: Optimize peer state lookup with entry().or_insert_with()
  instead of separate contains_key()/insert()/get_mut() sequence.

symbol_envelope.rs: Remove unnecessary & references when constructing
  cipher objects (4 instances).

registry/lib.rs: Replace ok_or_else with ok_or where no closure is
  needed.

sandbox.rs: Add path traversal prevention in expand_path() by
  rejecting ".." components and absolute path segments, hardening
  the sandbox against directory escape attacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
